  "decision": "fail",

  "findings": [
    "Two adjacent bolt holes are empty — joint is incomplete and cannot seal or develop full rated pressure",
    "Installed bolts show uneven thread projection indicating inconsistent bolt length, load, or installation procedure",
    "No torque witness marks visible — no evidence of controlled tightening per ASME PCC-1 bolting procedure"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install missing bolts in the two empty holes with correct bolts of matching grade, size, and length",
    "Verify all bolts are correct per B16.5 flange/bolt compatibility and replace any incorrect-length bolts to achieve uniform projection",
    "Perform controlled tightening sequence per ASME PCC-1 and apply torque witness marks for inspection verification",
    "Re-inspect joint for completeness and bolt tension evidence before releasing to hydrotest"
  ],
  "rationale": "A flanged joint with missing bolts is structurally incomplete and cannot be tested safely. ASME PCC-1 requires all bolts installed and tightened in a controlled, documented sequence with witness marks. Uneven thread projection suggests improper bolt selection or inconsistent tightening. The joint must not proceed to hydrotest until all bolts are installed and torque is verified.",
  "references": ["ASME PCC-1", "ASME B16.5"]
}
